text:
HUMAN EXECUTION FAILURES — learn the mistake, keep the ticker tradeable:

• [disaster_tail_loss] One round-trip loss must never exceed ~3% of session equity. CTEV-style bleeds (−13% portfolio contribution) erase many small wins. Cut at stop immediately — no hope, no averaging down, no 'it will come back'.
  → Bot: EXIT at hard stop; never widen stop after entry; cap loss at MAX_SESSION_TRADE_LOSS_PCT.

• [held_too_long] Humans hold losers hoping for recovery — report trips on CTEV, PLUG, ENVB were hope-holds, not reasons to ban those symbols. Algo must EXIT when momentum fades or stop hits; same ticker can be traded again on the next 80%+ setup.
  → Bot: EXIT on spike_top fade or early_loss_threshold; re-enter symbol when conviction returns ≥80%.

• [unproductive_turnover] Fees were $317 (~29% of gross trading P&L). High turnover is the goal only when net edge per dollar traded beats round-trip cost.
  → Bot: SKIP weak setups (low conviction) — not symbols; penalize gross-win/net-loss trips.

• [wrong_execution_not_ticker] Energy sector net −9.97% on report — but USEG +3.21% shows energy names CAN win. PLUG loss was hope-hold on one trip; commander also profits volatile energy on calculated spikes. Judge each trip by conviction + exit — never blacklist PLUG or a sector.
  → Bot: ENTER energy/vol names at 80%+ lottery; EXIT fast; repeat symbol when next setup qualifies.

• [traded_without_edge] February was −7.94% — trading before setup quality confirmed. Stand aside until spike + entry_quality pass.
  → Bot: SKIP only when profit_probability < MIN on THIS setup — not because of ticker history.

• [overtrading_flat_periods] Humans keep clicking; algos should go flat when edge degrades (commander ended 100% cash after strong April).
  → Bot: After N fee-negative trips or loss streak, pause new entries until next session or regime shift.

• CTEV (Industrial): -14.1% contribution -13.4% | $-328
  Human error: Hope-held one industrial trip — largest dollar loss. Ticker not banned.
  Correct: EXIT at hard stop on THIS trip; CTEV tradeable again when next 80%+ lottery setup fires.

• PLUG (Energy): -10.3% contribution -9.3% | $-221
  Human error: Hope-held THIS round-trip through reversal. Commander also profits PLUG/vol energy on other calculated entries.
  Correct: EXIT at early_loss/spike_top on losing trip; RE-ENTER PLUG when spike≥2x and conviction≥80% (see USEG win same sector).

• ENVB (Healthcare): -9.1% contribution -9.1% | $-221
  Human error: Hope-held biotech after momentum faded — execution error, not symbol veto.
  Correct: EXIT on fade; ENVB OK to trade again on next vol spike with mechanical exit.

• SMTK (Technology): -22.5% contribution -5.8% | $-20
  Human error: Entered THIS setup below 80% conviction — weak vol, not calculated lottery.
  Correct: SKIP this weak setup only; SMTK still allowed when future scan hits 80%+ thresholds.
